description:
Serve WebP/AVIF images with responsive srcsets at build time. Add lazy loading with Intersection Observer for below-fold images. Convert PNG icons to SVG sprites.

**Rationale:** Images dominate LCP. Modern formats cut payloads 30-50%. SVG sprites eliminate icon font overhead and extra HTTP requests.
title: Image optimization pipeline with next-gen formats
